items.author: Mark Jones
items.body_excerpt:
Marquel Sutton may not make it through Summer League with Sacramento.

9 pt,5 reb tonight. Efficient.

His play is catching the eyes of a teams that with give him an Exhibit 10 deal,or 2 way deal. 

Don’t be surprised if he’s sitting in the stands before Summer League ends. 

Signed & Shut down.

items.title: 4-0. Chris Darnell's Kings squad is rolling through their early summer league schedule. It hasn't always been pretty but after going undefeated at the Cal Classic, the Kings picked up a win in their first game in Vegas, this time beating the Clippers by a final of 91-85. Here are
items.author: James Ham
items.body_excerpt: 4-0. Chris Darnell's Kings squad is rolling through their early summer league schedule. It hasn't always been pretty but after going undefeated at the Cal Classic, the Kings picked up a win in their first game in Vegas, this time beating the Clippers by a final of 91-85. Here are six quick thoughts:

items.title: Final score: Kings 91, Clippers 85
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
Final score: Kings 91, Clippers 85

More fouls between the two teams (55) than buckets (46)

Dylan Cardwell: 15 points, 5/8 FGs, 9 rebounds (9 fouls), 2 blocks, 3/3 FTs

Keaton Wagler: 7 points, 1/7 FGs
Darius Acuff: 19 points, 6/20 FGs

Clippers off until Sunday

items.title: Final: Kings 91, Clippers 85. Keaton Wagler scored 7 points in his Clippers debut. Cam Christie led with 15 points and 8 rebounds. Sean Pedulla and Nick Martinelli each had 11 off the bench. Baba Miller scored 12. Clippers next play on Sunday against Utah.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Final: Kings 91, Clippers 85. Keaton Wagler scored 7 points in his Clippers debut. Cam Christie led with 15 points and 8 rebounds. Sean Pedulla and Nick Martinelli each had 11 off the bench. Baba Miller scored 12. Clippers next play on Sunday against Utah.

They made 2 field goals in the third quarter

Kings need a timeout

items.title: Fever storm back to win in Phoenix 92-89. Kelsey Mitchell (29pts) scored the go-ahead bucket. Ty Harris, starting, scored 15 and Boston added 21/9.
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
Fever storm back to win in Phoenix 92-89. Kelsey Mitchell (29pts) scored the go-ahead bucket. Ty Harris, starting, scored 15 and Boston added 21/9.

Huge to complete the comeback and get a needed win after a loss last night. They’ll finish the road trip Sunday in Vegas.

items.title: It's halftime
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
It's halftime

Kings up 44-41

I'm just gonna be real with y'all

It's been a lot of people watching people movement and small talk 

So I'm gonna have to watch this jawn back and get back to you on some real takes lol... but I'm in here at least. appreciate y'all understanding!

items.title: The Fever fell down by double digits TWICE in that game. But they battled back each time, then made several clutch plays. Ty Harris and the available stars were great. Fever beat the Mercury 92-89 and improve to 13-9 at the season's halfway point.
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt: The Fever fell down by double digits TWICE in that game. But they battled back each time, then made several clutch plays. Ty Harris and the available stars were great. Fever beat the Mercury 92-89 and improve to 13-9 at the season's halfway point.

items.title: Halftime: Kings 44, Clippers 41. Cam Christie has 11 points and 5 rebounds, and Keaton Wagler got his first points as a Clipper on a 3-pointer. Clippers shooting 36% overall. Kings at 35%. Kings have doubled up the Clippers in FGA (44-22). A real Summer League vibe for this one.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Halftime: Kings 44, Clippers 41. Cam Christie has 11 points and 5 rebounds, and Keaton Wagler got his first points as a Clipper on a 3-pointer. Clippers shooting 36% overall. Kings at 35%. Kings have doubled up the Clippers in FGA (44-22). A real Summer League vibe for this one.

media.description: Dalton Johnson breaks down the Golden State Warriors' NBA Summer League win over the Dallas Mavericks on Thursday in Las Vegas.
